jobDescription: DESCRIPTIONAbout us: Adzuna is a job search engine that lists every job, everywhere. From launch in the UK in 2011, we now have more than 10 million visitors a month and are busy conquering the world from our office in West London. Right now, we’re seeking a Country Manager to join our world class team in helping millions of people find better, more fulfilling jobs. The role: We are offering a paid six-nine months fixed contract. Working with the IN/ SG Country Manager, you’ll work on marketing and assist with the business development. As the Graduate Marketing Intern you’ll be working on Indian and Singaporean Search Engine Optimisation ( SEO). By identifying and contacting appropriate websites and building links you’ll improve the ranking of Adzuna.in and Adzuna.sg on search engines. Next to this you’ll be looking after the Blog, helping with PR, developing partnerships (identify and contact new leads), manage our social presence and provide support for other daily marketing activities. You’ll be an integral member of our team, building something to be proud of, whilst being part of one of the fastest growing businesses in Europe. It's a fun and fast-moving environment. Join us! REQUIREMENTSAbout you: We don't like to put people in boxes, but you're likely to be able to demonstrate much of the below: Marketing planning, execution and traffic growth; Graduated from a numerical, communication or marketing degree; keen to learn more about internet marketing, SEO and link building in particular Have sufficient self-confidence to call bloggers, webmasters and other website owners Possess excellent writing skills and a large dose of creativity; Fluent in English. Some experience with SEO, blogging, social media marketing is a plus Other skills that we value: You like to roll up your sleeves, be hands-on, entrepreneurial, and thrive on juggling a lot of responsibilities at the same time. You self-identify as a great communicator with an energetic, action-oriented nature. BENEFITSWhat we offer:£21,950 salary25 days holiday Office gym Cycle to work scheme A positive attitude towards flexible working and parental leave A values-based culture Company contributory pension scheme Huge learning opportunity from smart, experienced colleagues Table tennis table and a program of team social events Bright, airy office with roof terrace, in the heart of bustling Fulham Broadway
